summary: M6-TASK-GRAPH-001 is READY as the first M6 task after M5 Gate PASS_WITH_LIMITS closure. The task is planning-only and must create the minimal M6 Alpha system-complete DAG before M6 implementation begins.

tests_run.result: M6 task graph seed task is valid.

decisions: M6 starts with a planning-only task graph task before implementation.
Manual node battle remains deferred from the 1.0 mainline and must not become a blocking M6/M7/M8 task.
M6 task graph must cover Roadmap M6 and acceptance matrix M6 goals without editing roadmap or acceptance matrix documents.
risks: M6 scope is broad; task graph review must keep tasks small, ordered, and non-overlapping.
Any attempt to reverse DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE is a Human Gate and is not authorized here.
requested_action: After this closure checkpoint enters main, start M6-TASK-GRAPH-001 with systems_architect writer and route the resulting graph to independent qa_reviewer review.
